summary: Upgraded the project-facing customer permission matrix so owner users now carry project/contract/cost/material/purchase operation authority, PM gains contract/material/purchase approval while keeping cost at user level, finance authority stays out of project-facing roles, and the WBS cost menu now aligns with cost operator visibility.

notes: The only owner-profile user with finance authority is admin because business_admin overlays business_full.
No finance authority leaked into PM.
Executive remained off base.group_system and group_sc_super_admin.

next_step: Resume Sichuan Baosheng first-batch business-flow validation against the upgraded project-facing permission baseline.
